title: lindera metcalfiana
intro: Lindera metcalfiana, also known as Metcalf's spicebush or Chinese spicebush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Lindera metcalfiana include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of the common cold, as well as acting as a digestive aid and antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be taken to support overall health and well-being.
